overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a group of people gathered around a bonfire on a rooftop or elevated industrial area at night, with a futuristic city skyline featuring illuminated twin towers visible in the background. The scene features dramatic teal and orange lighting typical of cyberpunk aesthetics, with characters sitting and standing around the fire while the camera remains static.

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime scene on an industrial rooftop where a group of people gather around a central bonfire. The warm firelight illuminates the seated and standing figures while casting long shadows, contrasting with the cool blue glow of futuristic twin towers visible in the distant city skyline. Makeshift metal sculptures and palm tree silhouettes frame the scene, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere of urban decay against corporate grandeur.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze over an industrial rooftop gathering that juxtaposes intimate warmth against a cold, futuristic metropolis. It begins with a focus on a group of people huddled around a central bonfire, where the flickering orange light casts long, dramatic shadows across the seated and standing figures. As the eye wanders outward, the warm glow of the fire contrasts with the cool blue luminescence of distant twin towers piercing the nighttime skyline. The scene then expands to reveal the surrounding environment, framing the gathering with makeshift metal sculptures and the dark silhouettes of palm trees. Finally, the perspective settles into a balance between the gritty textures of urban decay in the foreground and the sterile corporate grandeur of the city beyond.
